NICAR wants you

October 1995
Journalism & Newsroom

The National Institute for Computer-Assisted Reporting is hiring a training director and a systems director to oversee journalism education and data analysis services. Both positions involve shared responsibilities for training and managing NICAR's database resources.

NICAR wants you

The National Institute for Computer-Assisted Reporting is hiring for two positions.

NICAR seeks a training director who will oversee on-the-road classes in newsrooms across the country; and a systems director for data analysis and coordinating NICAR's database library. Both positions include sharing duties for training and data analysis.

For more information, call Brant Houston, NICAR's managing director, at (314) 882-1984, or send e-mail to brant@nicar.org.
